title: Insights
description: Reports, projections, and deeper views live here so the main navigation stays calm while the analysis stays close.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Turn your ledger into month-by-month summaries, category totals, and export-ready financial views.

spendingInsights.title: Spending Insights
spendingInsights.description: Find recurring patterns, category pressure, and the small habits that quietly move your budget.

forecast.title: Forecast
forecast.description: Project upcoming cash flow and see how expected income, bills, and spending affect the weeks ahead.

netWorth.title: Net Worth
netWorth.description: Track assets, liabilities, and the long-term direction of your personal balance sheet.

spendingHeatmap.title: Spending Heatmap
spendingHeatmap.description: Scan daily intensity by calendar pattern to spot clusters, spikes, and expensive routines.
